# CURSED Moderation Upgrade Scope

This branch is restricted to moderation and server-security changes only: manual moderation, AutoMod, anti-raid, anti-nuke, quarantine, lockdown, moderation cases, audit logging, staff safety controls, and the dashboard API paths that configure those systems.

Explicitly out of scope: AI, economy, tickets, welcome, autorole, games, pets, profiles, image generation, prefix behavior, dashboard navigation outside moderation/security, deployment architecture, and unrelated refactors.
